# nvinfer (gst-nvinfer) configuration for trt-pose body pose estimation
# Model: ResNet18-baseline-att-224x224  (trt-pose project)
# Targets NVIDIA T4 with TensorRT 8.x FP16

[property]
gpu-id=0

# Pre-built TRT engine (generated by scripts/convert_model.sh)
model-engine-file=models/trt_pose_resnet18.engine

# --- Model input ---
net-scale-factor=0.00392156862745098    # 1/255
offsets=123.675;116.28;103.53           # ImageNet BGR means × 255
network-input-order=0                   # NCHW
model-color-format=0                    # RGB

# --- Inference mode ---
network-mode=2          # 0=FP32  1=INT8  2=FP16  (FP16 for T4 speed)
batch-size=2            # stream 0=webcam  stream 1=tutorial video

# --- Output tensor configuration ---
# We use process-mode=1 and extract raw tensors in a probe callback.
# No bbox/class metadata is written; only raw cmap/paf tensors.
process-mode=1
network-type=100        # custom (no standard bbox/class post-processing)
output-tensor-meta=1    # write NvDsInferTensorMeta to frame user meta

# Names of output layers to expose via NvDsInferTensorMeta
output-blob-names=cmap;paf

# --- Performance ---
interval=0              # run every frame (no frame-skip)
gie-unique-id=1
maintain-aspect-ratio=0
symmetric-padding=0

# --- Optional INT8 calibration (not needed for FP16) ---
# int8-calib-file=models/calibration.cache
